description_long: This is a round ceramic plate with a decorative border featuring a dense pattern of dark stars on a lighter background. The center of the plate displays a sepia-toned portrait of a bearded man in formal attire, accompanied by a signature below the image. The rim of the plate is slightly scalloped, adding a subtle texture to its edge. The back of the plate is plain, with some discoloration and a small patch of wear visible. The plate's surface appears glossy and smooth, typical of glazed ceramics. The overall design suggests it may be a commemorative or collectible item.
description: A round ceramic plate with a star-patterned border and a sepia portrait of a bearded man in the center, finished with a glossy glaze.
description_view_0: The underside of the plate, showing a plain, slightly discolored surface with a small worn patch and no visible decoration.
description_view_1: A side profile of the plate, highlighting its shallow depth, gently sloped rim, and scalloped edge.
description_view_2: The front of the plate, featuring a star-patterned border and a sepia portrait of a bearded man with a signature below.
description_view_3: Another side profile, similar to view 1, showing the plate's thinness and the scalloped rim.
attribute_visibility_of_markings_or_insc: A sepia portrait and signature are visible on the front center, with a star pattern around the rim.
